title: deschampsia flexuosa var. montana
intro: Deschampsia flexuosa var. montana, also known as Mountain Hair Grass, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the grass family and is native to mountainous regions of Europe. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Mountain Hair Grass include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and act as an antimicrobial agent. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to promote skin health and prevent infection.
